description_long: This is a modern, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark brown, wood-like finish. The cabinet features three large, flat-front drawers with subtle, integrated horizontal grooves serving as handles, giving it a minimalist and sleek appearance. The top surface is flat and currently holds a small, cylindrical, textured container and a neatly folded dark cloth. The sides and back are plain, with a consistent wood grain texture visible throughout. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and no visible hardware or label holders. This type of cabinet is commonly used for organized storage of documents or office supplies in professional or home environments.
description: A dark brown, three-drawer filing cabinet with a minimalist design and integrated horizontal grooves as handles. The top holds a small container and a folded cloth, and the cabinet has a sleek, wood-like finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large drawers with integrated horizontal grooves as handles, and the top surface with a container and folded cloth.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wood-textured side and a partial view of the top with the container and cloth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wood-textured back and the top with both objects visible.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wood-textured surface and a partial view of the top, including the container and cloth.
